skills.intro: Offer a connection only when store data or an approved alt-text update is needed.
skills.publicAccess: No connection is needed for planning from merchant-supplied local images; do not create `skill-hub.env` for that path.
skills.workflowBoundary: Connection never replaces this skill's preview → explicit approval → `apply --execute` boundary. Optimize only image alt text.

skills.intro: Use this guide for the first Shopify connection before an Article audit or approved update.
skills.publicAccess: This skill needs Admin access; a public Article URL is only a locator, not an authorization path.
skills.workflowBoundary: Read access is required before Article lookup. A missing write scope may still allow audit and report generation, but it blocks `apply --execute`.

skills.intro: Connect only when the audit needs Shopify Admin evidence or the merchant requests an approved supported fix.
skills.publicAccess: A storefront-only review may inspect public signals without Admin authorization; it must not offer API fixes.
skills.workflowBoundary: Connection never replaces the preview → explicit approval → `apply --execute` boundary. This skill may apply only its documented V1 fixes.

skills.intro: Use Admin access for connected audits and approved fixes; select public storefront mode for a URL-only report.
skills.publicAccess: **Public storefront mode:** no Shopify credential or Admin authorization is needed. A private local config may retain the non-secret target domain for repeatable read-only commands; it must never offer writes.
skills.workflowBoundary: Every connected write still requires preview → explicit approval → `apply --execute`. Public storefront mode is report-only.

skills.intro: Connect only when the requested translation or locale/market review needs Shopify Admin data.
skills.publicAccess: CSV preparation can stay local; do not request a store connection until the merchant wants Admin reads or writes.
skills.workflowBoundary: Connection never replaces the skill's preview and explicit approval boundary before enabling languages, changing Markets, or registering translations.

skills.intro: Use store access only after the merchant supplies an owned or authorized WeChat source and requests a Shopify draft.
skills.publicAccess: WeChat extraction and draft planning can remain local. Do not create `skill-hub.env` until Shopify context, uploads, or draft creation are requested.
skills.workflowBoundary: Authorization never replaces preview → explicit approval → image upload and draft-write boundaries. This skill creates drafts only and never publishes.
